subcodes.title: Words to students at the 'Akka boys school in Dec. 1902
subcodes.first_line: Ponder upon this and understand what it means. One who associates with evil companions loses his reputation and his good name
subcodes.subjects: @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @education of children; moral education, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @exhortations and counsels, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @high station of learning, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
